'''ngahubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ngultrum|ngultrum]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-h-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ngultrum|ngultrum]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngahubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæhibith|ngæhibith]] || [[word:ngæhibij|ngæhibij]] || [[word:ngæhibish|ngæhibish]] || [[word:ngæhibi|ngæhibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngahuhubuth|ngahuhubuth]] || [[word:ngahuhubuj|ngahuhubuj]] || [[word:ngahuhubush|ngahuhubush]] || [[word:ngahuhubu|ngahuhubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngahubuth|ngahubuth]] || [[word:ngahubuj|ngahubuj]] || [[word:ngahubush|ngahubush]] || [[word:ngahubu|ngahubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngahufbuth|ngahufbuth]] || [[word:ngahufbuj|ngahufbuj]] || [[word:ngahufbush|ngahufbush]] || [[word:ngahufbuf|ngahufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngahubuthu|ngahubuthu]] || [[word:ngahubuju|ngahubuju]] || [[word:ngahubushu|ngahubushu]] || [[word:ngahubuku|ngahubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngahubuth|ngahubuth]] || [[word:ngahubuj|ngahubuj]] || [[word:ngahubush|ngahubush]] || [[word:ngahubu|ngahubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngahubuthul|ngahubuthul]] || [[word:ngahubujul|ngahubujul]] || [[word:ngahubushul|ngahubushul]] || [[word:ngahubukul|ngahubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngahubuthuthu|ngahubuthuthu]] || [[word:ngahubujuju|ngahubujuju]] || [[word:ngahubushushu|ngahubushushu]] || [[word:ngahubuku|ngahubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngahubuthun|ngahubuthun]] || [[word:ngahubujun|ngahubujun]] || [[word:ngahubushun|ngahubushun]] || [[word:ngahubukun|ngahubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngahubuthuoro|ngahubuthuoro]] || [[word:ngahubujuoro|ngahubujuoro]] || [[word:ngahubushuoro|ngahubushuoro]] || [[word:ngahubukuoro|ngahubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
